name: splunk-admin
description: Splunk administration reference covering all ~61 configuration files, all REST API endpoints, CLI commands, and troubleshooting diagnostics, plus add-on development with the UCC framework and the Splunk UI Toolkit (SUIT). Six eagerly-loaded skills (conf files, REST API, CLI, troubleshooting, UCC, UI toolkit) with gotchas and indexes, plus lazy-loaded per-file reference. Sourced from Splunk Enterprise 10.2.
